properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: That little form before us In death’s embrace, Sweet angel face, Has left a vacant place.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the little one sleep, Let the little one sleep, It is free from this world of care; The Master has come, And called it home, It is resting over there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our darling child is sleeping, It’s left this shore, Forevermore, Its suff’ring days are o’er.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Our little one is living Among the blest In sweeter rest; Our Father knoweth best.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our child has gone to glory; Let us prepare To meet it there, Eternal bliss to share.
